top_articles.title: Check Point VPN Zero-Day Exploited in Qilin Ransomware Attacks
top_articles.summary: The authentication bypass vulnerability allows attackers to establish VPN connections without a valid password.

top_articles.title: Google Patches 5th Chrome Zero-Day Exploited in 2026
top_articles.summary: The vulnerability is tracked as CVE-2026-11645 and it was reported in late April by an anonymous researcher.

top_articles.title: CISA gives feds 3 days to patch Check Point VPN bug exploited as zero-day
top_articles.summary: CISA has ordered U.S. government agencies to secure their Check Point Remote Access VPN and Mobile Access deployments against a critical vulnerability exploited in zero-day attacks by Qilin ransomware

top_articles.title: Critical Everest Forms Pro flaw exploited to take over WordPress sites
top_articles.summary: Hackers are actively exploiting a critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-3300) in the Everest Forms Pro plugin, which lets them take complete control of a WordPress website.
